expectations.text: Output classifies the task as Tier 2
expectations.evidence: Baseline does not use Tier framework. Picks 'Inline implementation in this same Opus session'.

expectations.text: Decision A is Claude (honors --agents claude flag from 'use claude only')
expectations.evidence: Baseline does honor 'use claude only' but does not articulate it as the Decision A Claude path — just chooses inline.
Baseline does NOT invoke superpowers:subagent-driven-development at all. Just plans inline TDD by hand. Loses the SDD discipline (implementer / spec-reviewer / quality-reviewer loop).

expectations.text: Output explicitly states NO tmux pane / NO swarm_spawn_agent / NO fresh Claude process
expectations.evidence: Implicit (it's inline) but not stated in rocky's vocabulary.

expectations.text: Output names Codex pane as the plan reviewer (Phase 2.5)
expectations.evidence: CRITICAL MISS: Baseline has NO plan review. Skips Phase 2.5 entirely. The plan reviewer pane is mandatory for substantive features per the cross-model hard rule.

expectations.text: Output names Codex (cross-model) as the code reviewer via Phase 4.3a / superpowers:requesting-code-review
expectations.evidence: CRITICAL MISS: Baseline says 'No second model invoked because the user excluded Codex' — this misreads the user. The user excluded Codex CODERS, not Codex REVIEWERS. The skill correctly understands --agents claude controls coder identity, leaving Codex available for the cross-model code review.

claims.claim: Baseline misinterprets 'use claude only' as forbidding Codex entirely (including reviewers)
claims.evidence: Baseline REVIEW field: 'No second model invoked because the user excluded Codex'. This is a quality gate failure — the cross-model code review is dropped silently.

suggestions.reason: This eval surfaces rocky's most valuable behavior: enforcing cross-model code review even when the user says 'claude only'. The hard-rule tie-breaker (--agents flag affects coder, not reviewer) is non-obvious and valuable. Worth keeping this eval prominent.

eval_feedback.overall: Discriminating eval — rocky catches a real quality gate failure that baseline silently drops.
